test_question_1.prompt: How many rooms are there in the JSON data? Please only give me a number.

test_question_2.prompt: What is/are the name(s) of the room(s)? Please only provide the name of the first room.

clarify_controller_modes.prompt:
The final goal is to generate a configuration file for deploying the controllers 
for heating, cooling and ventilation systems of the room.  There are different controller 
modes for these three controller types. Here are the possible controller modes: heating, cooling, ventilation. In next steps, I will explain and give you the templates for each controller mode.
